Selects and returns a random word from the provided list.

Selects and returns a random word from the provided list.

Returns the list of high difficulty words.
getLevel() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Level
Returns the current player level.
getLowLevelWords() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.words.Words
Returns the list of low difficulty words.
getMediumLevelWords() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.words.Words
Returns the list of medium difficulty words.
getSeconds() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Returns the remaining seconds of the current level.
getSecondsForLevel() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Level
Dynamically calculates the available seconds for the current level.
getTotalSeconds() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Returns the total seconds elapsed during the match.
